held_out_queries: AERJ used to have two sections — which section should I select when I submit?
Is plain APA 7th enough for my reference list, or does AERJ want a specific reference style?
Average time-to-first-decision and acceptance rate, and do I need to be an AERA member to submit?

edits.summary: Correct a stale instruction: AERJ is now ONE integrated journal — do NOT choose between the former 'Social and Institutional Analysis' and 'Teaching, Learning, and Human Development' sections (merged; began receiving manuscripts 2015-07-01, publishing 2016-01-01). Add the SAGE Harvard reference style layered on APA 7th. Add explicit live-check for decision timeline / acceptance rate / AERA membership (absent from source map).
edits.gate_reason: strict improvement 46 -> 100; corrected a behavior-changing stale fact (section choice) and a reference-style omission

result: aerj-submission held-out 46 -> 100 (+54). Lowest baseline of wave 3 — a stale 'choose a section' instruction plus an APA-only reference answer.
